characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light complexion. He has short dark hair, a neatly trimmed beard, and dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Brown crew-neck t-shirt. He wears a white wireless earbud in his right ear.
characters.demeanor: Engaged, slightly frustrated initially, then eager and happy as he learns.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Young adult, slender build, fair complexion. She has bright orange hair styled in an updo, large green eyes, and a soft, stylized face.
characters.wardrobe: Light-colored, possibly white or pale blue, top. She wears small gold hoop earrings.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: यार, English बोलना बड़ा मुश्किल लगता है। [Man, speaking English feels so difficult.]
Character B says: Hi! Let's practice. What is your name? [Hi! Let's practice. What is your name?]
Character A says: My name is Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character B says: Great start! But remember, 'is' is pronounced with a soft Z sound. Repeat: My name is Gustavo. [Great start! But remember, 'is' is pronounced with a soft Z sound. Repeat: My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: My name is Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: I have twenty-four years. [I have twenty-four years.]
Character B says: Good try! But in English, we use 'am' for age, not 'have'. Say 'I am twenty-four years old'. [Good try! But in English, we use 'am' for age, not 'have'. Say 'I am twenty-four years old'.]
Character A says: I am twenty-four years old. [I am twenty-four years old.]
Character B says: Now answer this: Do you speak English? [Now answer this: Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I speak English. [Yes, I speak English.]
Character B says: You got it! You're improving fast. [You got it! You're improving fast.]
Character A says: Hey! मैं रोज़ ऐसे ही English practice कैसे कर सकता हूँ? [Hey! How can I practice English like this every day?]
Character B says: Just download Supernova and talk to AI tutors like me! [Just download Supernova and talk to AI tutors like me!]
Character A says: Alright! मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ! [Alright! I'll download Supernova right now!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable frustration about speaking English.
- Demonstrates the core product value: interactive, real-time AI feedback on pronunciation and grammar.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.
